388.issue_title: Separate ST3 backend codebase into its own repository

cycles.name: C1
cycles.goal: Pre-migration cleanup: move 2 stranded MCP test files, delete dead code dirs from tracked git state, verify MCP test suite green
deliverables: D1: tests/unit/config/test_c_loader_structural.py moved to tests/mcp_server/unit/config/ and passing
D2: tests/unit/config/test_c_settings_structural.py moved to tests/mcp_server/unit/config/ and passing
D3: tests/unit/ directory fully removed from git tracking
D4: src/copilot_orchestration/, tests/copilot_orchestration/, temp/, proof_of_concepts/ removed from git tracking
D5: Full MCP test suite passes after all moves
D6: Quality gates pass on changed files
cycles.exit_criteria: D1-D6 all satisfied. git ls-files tests/unit/ returns empty. run_tests(path='tests/mcp_server/') all green. Quality gates pass.

cycles.name: C2
cycles.goal: GitHub repo renames and new repo creation
deliverables: D7: Existing S1mpleTrader repo renamed to ST1 on GitHub
D8: Current repo S1mpleTraderV3 renamed to phase-gate-mcp on GitHub
D9: New empty S1mpleTrader repo created under MikeyVK account
cycles.exit_criteria: D7-D9 all satisfied. New S1mpleTrader repo exists and is accessible.

cycles.name: C3
cycles.goal: Migrate ST3 content to new S1mpleTrader repo via git filter-repo with history preservation
deliverables: D10: New S1mpleTrader repo contains backend/, tests/backend/, locales/, docs/temp/, docs/architecture/, docs/coding_standards/, docs/reference/platform/, docs/reference/dtos/, docs/system/, docs/implementation/
D11: New repo git history contains only ST3-relevant commits (first commit 2025-10-26)
D12: New repo does NOT contain mcp_server/, .phase-gate/, AGENTS.md, scripts/
D13: New repo has a minimal pyproject.toml covering backend* package
D14: docs/coding_standards/ present in new repo
cycles.exit_criteria: D10-D14 all satisfied. No mcp_server/, .phase-gate/, or AGENTS.md present in new repo. Git log first commit is 2025-10-26.

cycles.name: C4
cycles.goal: Remove ST3 content from phase-gate-mcp repo and update pyproject.toml
deliverables: D15: backend/, tests/backend/, locales/, docs/architecture/, docs/reference/platform/, docs/reference/dtos/, docs/system/, docs/implementation/ removed from phase-gate-mcp git tracking
D16: pyproject.toml updated: packages.find.include contains only mcp_server*; package name updated
D17: Full MCP test suite passes after ST3 removal
D18: Quality gates pass
D19: No backend.* imports found in mcp_server/ source
D20: docs/temp/ removed from git tracking in phase-gate-mcp repo (ST3 content; migrated to S1mpleTrader via C3)
cycles.exit_criteria: D15-D20 all satisfied. run_tests(path='tests/mcp_server/') all green. Quality gates pass. No backend/ directory in repo. No docs/temp/ in repo. docs/archive/ stays with phase-gate-mcp.

cycles.name: C5
cycles.goal: Full repo cleanup: fix C4 git rm regression, physically delete ST3 dirs, remove obsolete files, update configs, clean up migration-only tests, reconstruct venv after workspace rename
deliverables: D21: docs/architecture/ (excl. VSCODE_AGENT_ORCHESTRATION.md already moved) removed from git tracking and disk
D22: VSCODE_AGENT_ORCHESTRATION.md moved to docs/development/archive/issue257/ (git mv)
D23: backend/, tests/backend/, locales/ correctly removed from git tracking (C4 fix) and deleted from disk
D24: docs/system/, docs/implementation/, docs/temp/, docs/reference/dtos/, docs/reference/platform/ removed from git tracking and deleted from disk
D25: start_mcp_server.ps1 removed from git tracking and disk
D26: mcp_config.yaml removed from git tracking and disk

D27: Untracked dead dirs removed from disk: tests/acceptance/, tests/copilot_orchestration/, tests/integration/, tests/regression/, tests/unit/, tests/fixtures/, src/, temp/, simpletraderv3.egg-info/, build/, dist_new/
D28: .vscode/mcp.json GITHUB_REPO updated to phase-gate-mcp
D29: docs/setup/mcp.json GITHUB_REPO updated to phase-gate-mcp
D30: pyrightconfig.json include list cleaned (remove backend entry)
D31: test_c4_separation_structural.py deleted; two permanent boundary tests moved to tests/mcp_server/unit/test_mcp_server_boundary.py
D32: MCP test suite passes after all removals
D33: Quality gates pass
D34: After manual workspace rename to pgmcp: .venv recreated, pip install -e .[dev] succeeds, health_check passes
cycles.exit_criteria: D21-D33 satisfied on branch before rename. D34 satisfied after manual workspace rename and venv reconstruction. run_tests(path='tests/mcp_server/') green. Quality gates pass.
